title: medicula lupulina subsp. willdenowiana
intro: Medicula lupulina subsp. willdenowiana, also known as the woodland lupin, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Medicula lupulina subsp. willdenowiana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
